title.en: The words of the Lord of the Yuan Gu made the F...

content.en:
The words of the Lord of the Yuan Gu made the First God Lord stunned.

"I didn't expect that there would be a Destroyer in the Abyss of Destruction!!"

The First Divine Lord was secretly surprised.

Immediately, he was glad to have the supreme of the twelve universe epochs to support, otherwise if these supremes of them encountered a destroyer king, they would definitely die, and they would not even be able to leave.

But in the blink of an eye, if it weren't for the plans of those supreme beings of the Twelve Universe Eras, it wouldn't have led to such a situation.

In short, the Destruction Abyss Turmoil was created by the Twelve Universe Eras, and it was supposed to be solved by them.

Rumble!!!!

Another terrifying aura came from the depths of the Abyss of Destruction, followed by a terrifying cry, and another King of Destruction appeared.

"Let's go deep into the Abyss of Destruction and suppress those who destroy the king, the exit of the abyss of destruction is too big, and too many destructive creatures rush out, if you don't suppress it internally, you will not stop the destroyer of the king at all. "

The Lord of the Yuan Gu suggested.

The strength of each of their supremes is indeed very strong, and the strength of at least a dozen supremes is enough to compete with a king of destruction, but even if a dozen supremes are united, it is difficult to kill a king of destruction, and even if they can be killed, it will take a long time.

They can't cause the entire universe to enter the universe in advance in order to destroy a Destruction King, right?

That doesn't make any sense!

Therefore, they could only prevent the King of Destruction from coming out, and then try to seal the Abyss of Destruction step by step.

The process will take a long time, but they have no choice.

"Rush!"

Some supremes such as the Lord of the Yuan Gu and the Golden Light Supreme rushed into the abyss of destruction, but they did not really enter the depths, otherwise the suppression of them would be too great, and they would not be able to compete with the King of Destruction at all.

As a result, they chose to intercept the Destroying Creatures in the upper regions of the Abyss of Destruction.

There are also some Supremes who are responsible for killing other destructive creatures outside.

But even so, the number of Supremes is still not enough, and reinforcements are still needed.

But in general, the safety of the Supremes is guaranteed, at least they will not fall so easily, and even if they are in a dangerous situation, it is easy to have other Supremes to support.

So, it's a lot better than before.

......

Terran, Holy City.

Many forces have been recruited to go to the Abyss of Destruction to kill the creatures of destruction.

And Ye Tian is also in the scope of recruitment, he is the peak realm of the cosmic god, and his combat power is extremely strong.

If he doesn't go, then what do the other cosmic gods think?

Therefore, Ye Tian must go.

Heavenly Pavilion.

Xiao Yue told Ye Tian and said, "Husband, be careful, try not to trouble those powerful and destructive creatures." There are many strong people in the universe, and there is no shortage of you!"

"Don't worry, I know the measure!" Ye Tian assured.

Holy City, East Gate.

Huge warships are docked there, waiting for the cosmic gods and masters to enter.

At this time, Ye Tiancai truly realized how many cosmic gods there were in the Holy City.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's eyes were fixed on one of the warships, and the sign on it was the symbol of the Heavenly Gate.

"It's the battleship of the Four Heavenly Gates!"

Ye Tian also saw many Heavenly Gate sergeants entering this battleship, and some of them were still ordinary cosmic gods.

It stands to reason that ordinary cosmic gods can not go, but it seems that all the cosmic gods of Tianmen go there.

Ye Tian entered an ordinary battleship, entered the main cabin, and saw other cosmic gods, there were probably thousands of cosmic gods on this battleship.

However, it is not known that a few will make it back alive.

Soon, the battleship gathered almost 1,400 cosmic gods and set off for the battlefield.

Suddenly, a master appeared.

This lord is the famous Hitomi Lord of the Holy City, and he is subordinate to the City Lord's Mansion.

"Everyone, I am the master of Hitomi Hui, and I am the commander of this battleship, since you have entered this battleship, there are some arrangements that still need to be mentioned. The cosmic god is indeed very powerful in the human race, but it is very weak on the battlefield of destroying creatures, and a single cosmic god can easily be besieged and killed. I suggest, in groups of five, join the battlefield. Of course, I won't force you to form a team, but I just make a suggestion that I hope you can freely choose your teammates to form a team!"

With that, the Hitomi Juggernaut left the place.

As soon as the Pupil Light Master left, a group of people came to Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, let's team up together!"

"Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, my strength is very strong, choose me to form a team!"

"Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, I am proficient in illusion, I can help a little, choose me!"

......

Looking at this group of cosmic gods, Ye Tian knew their plans.

After all, his reputation is outside, and these cosmic gods naturally know him.

He is known as the first genius of the universe, and his combat power is incomparably terrifying, even the Son of the Era can defeat him, who doesn't want to team up with him.

After all, following Ye Tian's side, at least there is a guarantee!

Ye Tian didn't want to form a team, and wanted to carry out the task of killing and destroying creatures alone, but after thinking about it carefully, it was not bad to have a few more people to fight.

Moreover, the battlefield of these cosmic gods is naturally the rear, which is to intercept some weaker destructive creatures, so these cosmic gods are not a drag.

Immediately, Ye Tian used his copying talent to take a look at the talent of these cosmic gods.

He wanted to pick a few cosmic gods who were stronger to save his life, and he didn't want to go to the rescue of these companions all the time, that would definitely delay his time.

"You, you, and you, would you like to team up with me?"

Ye Tianyi called four people in a row.

"Yes!"

The four of them were overjoyed and nodded hurriedly.

Seeing that Ye Tian had chosen his teammates, the other cosmic gods naturally no longer surrounded Ye Tian, but went to look for teammates with each other.

Soon, Ye Tian became familiar with these four teammates.

These four divisions are called the Frost Flower Divine Lord, the Seven Sword Divine Lord, the Langya Divine Lord, and the Black Wind Divine Lord, of which the Frost Flower Divine Lord is a female Divine Lord.

The cultivation of these four cosmic gods is the peak realm of cosmic gods, and their breath is also very powerful, not weak cosmic gods.

The reason why Ye Tian chose them was because they all had healing talents, immortal talents, or other types of recovery talents, plus their defensive abilities were not bad, and their life-saving abilities were better.

During the chat, Ye Tian also knew their origins.

The Frost Flower Divine Lord belongs to a force called the Frost Flower Palace in the Holy City, which is as powerful as the Heavenly Pavilion, and the Seven Sword Divine Lord, the Langya Divine Lord, and the Black Wind Divine Lord are all under the command of the Divine Blade Alliance and are free members.

Because of this, they entered this battleship instead of following the internal warships of the Divine Blade Alliance to the battlefield.
